name: CRUD/conditional-patch
description: Conditional patch (PATCH /Patient?search-params with a FHIR Patch Parameters body) conformance tests: 404 on no match, 412 on no criteria or multiple matches, single-match patch application, and If-Match version precondition handling. Only the FHIR Patch (Parameters resource) body form is covered; the JSON Patch array body form is not supported by this suite's static-fixture model.

variable.name: versionPatientId
variable.description: Server-assigned id of the Patient created in setup for the If-Match version tests (CP-VERSION)

variable.name: cpVersion
variable.description: versionId assigned after the round-trip update in setup bumps the CP-VERSION Patient to its second version

operation.description: Unconditionally create the Patient that the single-match patch test will update (CP-ONEMATCH)
Unconditionally create the first of two Patients sharing identifier CP-MULTI
Unconditionally create the second of two Patients sharing identifier CP-MULTI
Unconditionally create the Patient used for the If-Match version tests (CP-VERSION), initially at version 1
Read the CP-VERSION Patient back so it can be round-tripped through an update
Round-trip PUT the CP-VERSION Patient to bump it from version 1 to version 2

test.name: Conditional patch with no existing match returns 404
test.description: PATCH /Patient?identifier=... matching no existing resource; the server must return 404 Not Found.

test.name: Conditional patch with no search criteria is rejected
test.description: PATCH /Patient with no search criteria; the server must reject the request, expected as 412 Precondition Failed (400 Bad Request accepted as a warningOnly alternative since the spec doesn't mandate a specific status here).

operation.description: Conditional PATCH /Patient with no query string

assert.description: Alternative: 400 Bad Request is also accepted

test.name: Conditional patch with exactly one match applies the patch
test.description: PATCH /Patient?identifier=... matching exactly one existing Patient with a FHIR Patch replacing gender and deleting address; the server must apply the patch and return 200 OK with the updated content.

operation.description: Conditional PATCH /Patient?identifier=...CP-ONEMATCH, matches the single seeded Patient

assert.description: Response body must be a Patient
gender must have been replaced with female

test.name: Conditional patch with multiple existing matches fails
test.description: PATCH /Patient?identifier=... matching two existing Patients; the server must return 412 Precondition Failed.

operation.description: Conditional PATCH /Patient?identifier=...CP-MULTI, matches both seeded Patients

test.name: Conditional patch honors If-Match with the current version
test.description: PATCH /Patient?identifier=... with an If-Match header matching the resource's current version; the server must apply the patch and return 200 OK.

operation.description: Conditional PATCH /Patient?identifier=...CP-VERSION with If-Match matching the current versionId

test.name: Conditional patch with a mismatched If-Match version fails
test.description: PATCH /Patient?identifier=... with an If-Match header carrying a stale version; the server must return 412 Precondition Failed and not apply the patch.

operation.description: Conditional PATCH /Patient?identifier=...CP-VERSION with a deliberately wrong If-Match version
Teardown: conditional delete the CP-ONEMATCH Patient
Teardown: conditional delete both CP-MULTI Patients
Teardown: conditional delete the CP-VERSION Patient
